source_meta.source_document: Exeter and UHR Universal Head Bipolar System

systems.system_notes: Cemented hemiarthroplasty construct combining the Exeter femoral stem family with the UHR Universal Head Bipolar System.

trays.tray_notes: Official Exeter and UHR materials support the combined stem and bipolar head construct with dedicated operative instrumentation.

components.component_notes: Official Exeter product materials describe the polished cemented Exeter femoral stem family.
Official UHR materials describe the bipolar cup family with multiple outer diameters and compatible inner head sizes.
The UHR bipolar system is specified for compatible 22 mm, 26 mm, and 28 mm head sizes used with the Exeter stem construct.

products.product_name: UHR Bipolar Head 36 mm for 22 mm Head
products.product_notes: Official UHR bipolar system brochure lists catalogue number UH1-36-22 for 36 mm outer diameter with 22 mm head compatibility.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The UHR brochure lists additional bipolar head diameters and compatible head sizes beyond the first captured code.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper expansion pass is needed to capture the full bipolar size table.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction captures one explicit bipolar head code and the core implant families only.
